mapper.sql: id, connection_code, provider_type, base_url, credential_ciphertext, credential_mask, config_json::text as config_json, enabled, created_by, updated_by, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: insert into document_parse_connections ( connection_code, provider_type, base_url, credential_ciphertext, credential_mask, config_json, enabled, created_by, updated_by ) values ( #{connection.connectionCode}, #{connection.providerType}, #{connection.baseUrl}, #{connection.credentialCiphertext}, #{connection.credentialMask}, #{connection.configJson,typeHandler=com.xbk.lattice.infra.persistence.mybatis.PostgresJsonbTypeHandler}, #{connection.enabled}, #{connection.createdBy}, #{connection.updatedBy} ) returning id
mapper.update: update document_parse_connections set connection_code = #{connection.connectionCode}, provider_type = #{connection.providerType}, base_url = #{connection.baseUrl}, credential_ciphertext = #{connection.credentialCiphertext}, credential_mask = #{connection.credentialMask}, config_json = #{connection.configJson,typeHandler=com.xbk.lattice.infra.persistence.mybatis.PostgresJsonbTypeHandler}, enabled = #{connection.enabled}, updated_by = #{connection.updatedBy}, updated_at = current_timestamp where id = #{connection.id}
mapper.select: select from document_parse_connections order by id desc
